The '''White Wings of Hope''' were a sacred [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] item that once belonged to an ancient Ewok warrior. They comprised a headband with tufts of white feathers on each side. Around [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], prior to the journey to locate and rescue the parents of the shipwrecked [[Human/Legends|Humans]] [[Mace Towani|Mace]] and [[Cindel Towani]] from a [[Gorax/Legends|Gorax]], the journey's caravan leader—[[Deej Warrick]]—was presented the sacred item by the Ewok medicine man [[Logray/Legends|Logray]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]''
